description: Main front-end page component for a task management app with styling, task CRUD operations, authentication, filtering, and UI components.

methods.name: formatStatusLabel
methods.description: Converts TaskStatus value into a user-friendly label.

methods.name: formatPriorityLabel
methods.description: Converts TaskPriority value into a user-friendly label.

methods.name: todayISODate
methods.description: Returns today's date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

methods.name: groupByStatus
methods.description: Groups an array of tasks by their status.

methods.name: sortTasksForColumn
methods.description: Sorts tasks by priority and due date.
